senses.definition: a piece of climbing equipment used by rock climbers and mountaineers to attach ropes to anchors

examples.x: The climber used a quickdraw to secure the rope to the bolt.
Make sure to check each quickdraw before starting the climb.
She clipped a quickdraw to the carabiner with ease.
The quickdraw saved him from a dangerous fall.
Quickdraws are essential gear for sport climbing.

senses.definition: a set of tools or components used to adjust and optimize the performance of sports equipment, such as skis or bicycles

examples.x: He used a tuning kit to fine-tune his mountain bike before the race.
She purchased a tuning kit to customize her skateboard for better performance in competitions.
The archery coach brought a tuning kit to the tournament to make precise adjustments to the bow.
A high-quality tuning kit is essential for maintaining the peak performance of golf clubs.
Using a tuning kit, she modified her surfboard for enhanced maneuverability in big waves.

senses.definition: the bar that holds the sail and helps control its movement in windsurfing

examples.x: The windsurfer gripped the boom tightly as they sped across the water.
She adjusted the boom to catch more wind and increase speed.
The boom hit the water with a splash as the windsurfer fell into the lake.
The boom was lightweight yet sturdy, designed for optimal control.
The windsurfer's hands blistered from gripping the boom during a long session.

senses.definition: a device that lets two shafts rotate at different angles while transmitting power

examples.x: The universal joint enabled smooth rotation between the engine and the drive shaft in the car.
Mechanics often replace universal joints in vehicles during regular maintenance to ensure drivetrain reliability.
The universal joint's design accommodates changes in shaft angles without losing torque.
The boat's steering mechanism used a universal joint to allow flexible movement across waves.
Every mechanical system requiring angular movement at various angles uses a universal joint.

senses.definition: a specialized sports equipment used for carrying and storing fencing gear, such as masks, swords, and protective clothing

examples.x: The fencing bag's sturdy material protected his gear from damage during travel.
The fencing bag contained essential items like a body cord and scoring equipment.
They stored the team's fencing bags in the equipment room between tournaments.
A personalized tag on her fencing bag made it easy to identify in a crowded venue.
After practice, he aired out his fencing bag to prevent the equipment from developing odors.

senses.definition: a big, usually round or rectangular bag used to carry golf equipment

examples.x: During the tournament, he organized his clubs carefully in the golf bag.
The golf bag's compartments kept the clubs organized and easily accessible.
Every golfer needs a sturdy golf bag to carry their equipment around the course.
Golf bags typically include pockets for storing golf balls, tees, and other essentials.
He upgraded his golf bag to a model with ergonomic straps for better comfort.

senses.definition: a protective case designed to transport and store a surfboard safely

examples.x: The surfboard bag was padded to prevent any damage to the board.
He bought a new surfboard bag to protect his board during travel.
He customized his surfboard bag with his initials embroidered on it.
The surfboard bag had a shoulder strap for easy carrying.
The surfboard bag kept the board safe from scratches and dings.

senses.definition: a component of ammunition that is loaded into a firearm, including a casing or a hull, gunpowder, a primer, and a projectile

examples.x: The soldier carefully loaded the shell into the cannon, preparing for the next round of artillery fire.
The shell casing was found at the crime scene, providing a crucial piece of evidence for the investigators.
He examined the shell meticulously, checking for any defects before inserting it into the rifle.
The shell burst upon impact, causing a massive explosion and creating a significant crater in the ground.

senses.definition: the firm, trapezoid or rectangular mat used in gymnastics for stepping and vaulting practice

examples.x: The gymnast used the block to practice her beam routine.
He adjusted the block to perfect his bars routine.
The coach secured blocks together for stability.
Blocks were stacked for an elevated platform.
Gymnasts lined up on blocks for their routine.

senses.definition: a padded surface used in gymnastics and cheerleading to cushion landings

examples.x: The gymnast landed perfectly on the landing mat after executing a flawless dismount.
The wrestling coach rolled out the landing mat for the team's practice session.
Cheerleaders practice their stunts and jumps onto the landing mat to ensure safety.
The gymnastics competition featured a variety of apparatus, each with its own designated landing mat.

senses.definition: a portable mat that folds up, used in sports like gymnastics and martial arts for exercises on the floor

examples.x: The gymnast unfolded her folding panel mat before practicing her routine.
He carried his folding panel mat to karate class for practicing throws.
The yoga instructor rolled out a folding panel mat for the students.
The gym supplied folding panel mats for the children's tumbling class.
Athletes warmed up on folding panel mats before the competition.

senses.definition: a tilted piece of equipment used in gymnastics and yoga

examples.x: He used the incline mat for stretching exercises.
She practiced her handstands on the incline mat.
The incline mat helped improve her balance during yoga.
Incline mats are essential for gymnasts learning flips and rolls.
Gymnastics studios provide incline mats for training sessions.

senses.definition: a padded mat used primarily in gymnastics and martial arts to cushion falls and landings

examples.x: The gymnast landed perfectly on the crash mat after her dismount.
Martial arts students practiced throws onto the crash mat to avoid injury.
He fell backward off the balance beam but landed safely on the crash mat.
The judo class spent the session practicing throws and falls onto the crash mat.
During trampoline practice, the crash mat was placed beneath for safety.

senses.definition: a protective cushion used in gymnastics, particularly on balance beams, to prevent injuries

examples.x: The gymnast fell off the beam but landed safely on the beam pad.
The beam pad provides extra cushioning during practice sessions.
She landed her dismount perfectly on the beam pad.
The new beam pad design offers enhanced shock absorption.
Make sure the beam pad is securely fastened to avoid any accidents.

senses.definition: a sports equipment used primarily in baseball and softball to automatically pitch balls to batters for practice

examples.x: The coach set up the pitching machine to practice fastball drills with the team.
He adjusted the settings on the pitching machine to simulate different types of pitches.
The pitching machine malfunctioned and started throwing erratic pitches.
The pitching machine can be calibrated to pitch at various speeds and angles.
Coaches emphasize timing and technique when using the pitching machine.

senses.definition: a mechanical device designed to assist in playing or training for baseball, typically used in professional sports training facilities

examples.x: The baseball robot accurately pitches balls at varying speeds for batting practice.
Teams are increasingly using baseball robots to simulate game scenarios during training sessions.
The advanced sensors on the baseball robot analyze swing mechanics for player feedback.
Coaches rely on baseball robots to throw consistent strikes during pitching drills.
Players appreciate the realism that baseball robots bring to their batting practice routines.

senses.definition: a machine used to string or restring sports equipment such as tennis rackets, badminton rackets, or squash rackets

examples.x: The tennis player used a stringing machine to replace the broken strings on his racket.
She bought a high-quality stringing machine to maintain her badminton racket's tension.
He learned how to use a stringing machine to customize the string tension on his tennis racket.
The professional tennis player travels with his own portable stringing machine to tournaments.
The sports store technician recommended a specific stringing machine for customers who play competitive badminton.
